overview: Forestheals is a luxury eco-friendly Ayurvedic eCommerce platform offering 20 premium natural products — powders, seeds, spices, and skincare. The brand tagline 'From forest to homes' reflects its mission to bring nature's healing power to everyday households. Built with a full shopping experience including user accounts, cart, Stripe checkout, admin panel, and a unique disease-to-product health recommendation system.
features: 20 real Ayurvedic products with eco-friendly kraft paper packaging
Disease-to-product recommendation system for hair fall, stress, immunity and more
Full shopping cart with persistent storage across sessions
Stripe checkout + Cash on Delivery payment options
User dashboard with orders, wishlist, and invoice download
Admin panel for product, order, and review management
Product bundles — skincare and haircare bundles with automatic discounts
B2B bulk inquiry form with export/bio-coal section
WhatsApp floating button for instant customer support
Flash sale timer and coupon code system
Reviews and verified ratings on all products
Legal pages — Terms, Privacy, Refund Policy
Services coming soon page with email capture
Community email signup embedded across all pages
SEO-optimized pages with meta tags and Open Graph support
